list.name: Changes
list.comment: feat(fpmul): Added Goldilocks field and tests for FPMul

task.summary: Default task

feat(honeybadger)!: Implementation of multiplication for HoneyBadger.
This commit contains the implementation of the multiplication for the HoneyBadger protocol. The multiplication is implemented using just one handler. For the moment the `process` function is in the `HoneyBadgerMPCNode`
fix(honeybadger): keep consistency between triples used in the multiplication.
fix(honeybadger): keep consistency between triples used in the multiplication.
fix(honeybadger): add concurrency locking to the node instances in the HoneyBadgerMPCNode.

fix(honeybadger): add fixes to batch reconstruction for testing.
There are errors in the multiplication.
test(honeybadger): changed parameter for multiplication test.

feat(types): implementation of secret and clear types for integers and fixed-point with affine operations.
This commit does not include operations like multiplication and division between secret types as they require communication, and they are more involved.
fix(types): change the robust Shamir share to be an arbitrary Shamir share.
feat(types): added linear operations for clear types.
feat(types): added mechanisms to erroneous precision.
feat(types): added functions to change fixed-point and integer precision.
feat(types): added operators for Shamir SS.
feat(types): added operators for Shamir SS.
feat(types): added operators for Shamir SS.
feat(preprocessing): added random bit generation protocol.
fix(preprocessing): send the session ID to the caller function.
fix(preprocessing): use a vector for triples
fix(preprocessing): use a vector for triples
feat(acss): implemented Pedersen commitments with basic tests.
fix(acss): minor import changes in Pedersen
fix(goldilocks): Implementation of Goldilocks using Arkworks traits.
fix(goldilocks): Implementation of the correct trait.
feat(share_gen): added share generation for Goldilocks field.
feat(test): Initial test for RandBit
feat(test): Added test for PRandBitD
feat(test): Added test for TruncPr

feat(test): Added tests for FMul.
During the addition of these tests, I found an error in truncation and fixed-point multiplication. Run the tests for more insights.
feat(test): Finished tests for FMul.
merge: Finished git rebase. Some fixes are needed.
chore: removed .idea folder

fix(honeybadger): partial fix to routing of protocols.
The fix is not completed yet. I think that the routing for AVSS protocols is not yet ready.

fix(honeybadger): partial fix to routing of protocols.
The fix is not completed yet. I think that the routing for AVSS protocols is not yet ready.

fix(honeybadger): correction of curve generics.
The fix is not completed yet. I think that the routing for AVSS protocols is not yet ready.
fix(honeybadger): correction of rbc.
fix(honeybadger): correction of rand bit and tests.
chore: fix code formating.
chore: fix code to comply with clippy.
feat(fpmul): Added Goldilocks field and tests for FPMul

MESSAGE.value: feat(types): added mechanisms to erroneous precision.
feat(types): added functions to change fixed-point and integer precision.
feat(types): added operators for Shamir SS.
feat(preprocessing): added random bit generation protocol.
fix(preprocessing): send the session ID to the caller function.
fix(preprocessing): use a vector for triples
feat(acss): implemented Pedersen commitments with basic tests.
fix(acss): minor import changes in Pedersen
fix(goldilocks): Implementation of Goldilocks using Arkworks traits.
fix(goldilocks): Implementation of the correct trait.
feat(share_gen): added share generation for Goldilocks field.
feat(test): Initial test for RandBit
feat(test): Added test for PRandBitD
feat(test): Added test for TruncPr

feat(test): Added tests for FMul.
During the addition of these tests, I found an error in truncation and fixed-point multiplication. Run the tests for more insights.
feat(test): Finished tests for FMul.
merge: Finished git rebase. Some fixes are needed.
chore: removed .idea folder

fix(honeybadger): partial fix to routing of protocols.
The fix is not completed yet. I think that the routing for AVSS protocols is not yet ready.

fix(honeybadger): correction of curve generics.
The fix is not completed yet. I think that the routing for AVSS protocols is not yet ready.
fix(honeybadger): correction of rbc.
fix(honeybadger): correction of rand bit and tests.
chore: fix code formating.
chore: fix code to comply with clippy.
feat(fpmul): Added Goldilocks field and tests for FPMul

option.value: feat(fpmul): Added Goldilocks field and tests for FPMul
